# Skills & Artisyn SDK

**Generated by `workspace.py generate`. Hand-edits are preserved via the `.artisyn/.generated-hashes.json` baseline; pass `--force-*` flags to discard them.**

---

## Skills

Skills are in `.claude/skills/`. Each has a `SKILL.md` with instructions.

- `aila-catalog-sdk` тАФ 
- `workspace-management` тАФ Kiro workspace lifecycle тАФ define, generate, catalog, publish
- `generic-sdlc` тАФ 
- `lead-orchestration` тАФ 
- `extract-project-kb` тАФ 
- `extract-domain-kb` тАФ 
- `review-domain-kb` тАФ 
- `extract-code-kb` тАФ 
- `decompose-initiative` тАФ 
- `decompose-epic` тАФ 
- `estimate-story` тАФ 
- `author-adr` тАФ 
- `author-story` тАФ 
- `author-bug` тАФ 
- `skill-management-aila` тАФ 
- `workspace-audit` тАФ 
- `workspace-agents-refine` тАФ 
- `workshop-executor` тАФ 

---

## Artisyn SDK API

```python
from artisyn_skill_sdk import (
    aila_list_skills, aila_get_skill, aila_search_skills,
    aila_get_skill_resource, aila_create_skill, aila_save_skill,
    aila_describe_providers, aila_self_diagnostics,
)
```

| Operation | Function |
|-----------|----------|
| List all skills | `aila_list_skills()` |
| Search skills | `aila_search_skills(query, category, tags)` |
| Get skill content | `aila_get_skill(name)` |
| Get skill resource | `aila_get_skill_resource(name, path)` |
| Create new skill | `aila_create_skill(name, content, provider_name)` |
| Update skill | `aila_save_skill(name, content, provider_name)` |
| System diagnostics | `aila_self_diagnostics()` |
| List providers | `aila_describe_providers()` |

All functions are in `artisyn_skill_sdk.api`. Auto-initialize from `~/.artisyn/settings.json`.

> **Note:** SDK functions require the Bash tool to execute Python.
> Management agents (dm, pm, am and variants) do not have Bash.
> Delegate SDK operations to an agent that has Bash.
